title: Zygophlebia villosissima
taxonomy: Zygophlebia villosissima is a species of fern in the family Lomariopsidaceae. It belongs to the genus Zygophlebia. The classification of Zygophlebia villosissima is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Division: Pteridophyta, Class: Polypodiopsida, Order: Polypodiales, Family: Lomariopsidaceae, Genus: Zygophlebia, and Species: Z. villosissima. Further classification within the family Lomariopsidaceae places it in the tribe Lomariopsidinae. This fern is native to tropical regions of Central and South America.
